title: Hydro Reanimodel Pack [Cobblemon]
description: This Cobblemon addon adds or reanimates models that do not have animations or are otherwise not in the game and no other addon as one (sometimes)
body:
The Re-animodel addon adds Pokemon models that are not modeled and no other addon has and reanimates existing base Cobblemon models.

If there are existing addons with these models, there will be no spawn pool for them.


(Kingambit made by Lazaro|Pokemans https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobblemon-pokemans)
